data.title: Absci Corp prices public offering: 16,670,000 shares at $3/share, may earn approx $50M. Underwriters have option for 2,500,500 more shares.
data.description: Absci Corporation, a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq as ABSI, revealed it has priced an underwritten public offering of 16,670,000 shares of its common stock at $3.00 per share on July 24, 2025. This offering, managed by underwriters, also includes a provision for the potential purchase of up to 2,500,500 additional shares within 30 days. The total gross proceeds before deductions for underwriting discounts, commissions, and offering expenses are estimated to reach around $50 million, excluding the option to purchase extra shares. All shares in this offering will be sold by Absci.

data.title: BNB dips to $766 from all-time high of $788; technical indicators show overbought conditions amidst institutional support.
data.description: The latest trading price of Binance Coin (BNB) is $766.30, representing a decrease of 1.97% from its all-time high of $788. Despite significant institutional support, technical indicators suggest that the coin is currently overbought.

data.title: Adecoagro S.A. completes cash tender offer for 6.000% Notes due 2027, details revealed in Luxembourg.
data.description: Luxembourg, July 24, 2025 - Adecoagro S.A. (NYSE: "AGRO") has disclosed the conclusion and outcomes of its recent cash offer, known as the Tender Offer, to acquire all of its remaining 6.000% Notes due 2027, as announced previously.
